summary_en: 53 shares of common stock to be cancelled effective 2026-06-01. Cancellation of all treasury shares held as of that date. Note: 72,600 shares held in trust for executive equity compensation not included in cancellation.
title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On 22 May 2026, Sumiken Mitsui Road Co., Ltd. announced a board resolution to cancel all treasury shares held by the company under the Companies Act (Article 178). The cancellation will take effect on 1 June 2026. As of 31 March 2026, the company held 53 treasury shares to be cancelled. The disclosure notes that 72,600 shares held in trust by Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Bank for the executive equity compensation scheme are excluded from this cancellation.
